base_size.note: Full screen canvas, individual elements vary

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Background wall of cage interior, provides warm neutral backdrop for all gameplay
context.screen_position: Fills entire screen from x=0 to x=128, y=0 to y=128
adjacent_elements: All other elements render on top of this background
context.usage_scenario: Always visible as the base layer. Represents the interior back wall of Echo's cage. Provides high contrast for Echo's orange body color.

visual_specification.shape: Solid rectangular fill covering entire screen. May include subtle horizontal cage bars at top (y=0-10px) in #C2C3C7 to indicate cage structure.
visual_specification.texture: Flat solid color with optional subtle pixel noise (1-2 random pixels in slightly darker shade #FFCCAA) to add hand-drawn warmth. No gradients.
visual_specification.details: Optional: 3-5 horizontal cage bars at top (y=2, 4, 6, 8, 10px) each 1px tall, 128px wide, color #C2C3C7 to suggest cage structure. Otherwise pure #FFF1E8 fill.

relationships.shared_with: All environment elements share this background
relationships.differences_from: Unlike floor: no interaction, lighter color. Unlike perch: fills entire screen, not a specific object.
